text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely get first place next time, though!
choice_data_list: It's not a win, but you still did very well.
You need to stay on your toes!
You need to stay on your toes!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely get first place next time, though!
choice_data_list: It's not a win, but you still did very well.
You need to stay on your toes!
You need to stay on your toes!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thanks, but what I want to show people is a lot better than this... I wanna show them peak racing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's why I gotta stay focused even if I place
well and keep trying to do better!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm counting on you to keep me on the
right path!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, all right! I'm gonna run my socks off when
we get back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing how optimistic Kitasan Black is warms my
heart.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've heard older students talk about how harsh
the world of racing is and how easy it is to get
overtaken if you lose focus for even a second.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to let my pride get the best of me.
I'll keep training and aiming for victory!
choice_data_list: Yeah! Let's give it our all!
Yeah! Let's give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Here's to our continued teamwork, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has a resolute glint in her eyes as
she gazes steadily toward her future.
